title: The Element Encyclopedia of 20,000 Dreams
author: Theresa Cheung
usage: Use as a broad cultural and symbolic index for common dream images. Do not treat entries as fixed meanings and do not reproduce source text verbatim.

title: Man and His Symbols
author: Carl Gustav Jung and collaborators
local_file: books/Man and His Symbols - Carl Gustav Jung.pdf
usage: Use as a methodological influence for symbolic, personal, archetypal and unconscious material. Keep user-facing language simple and non-academic.

title: Irreducible
author: Federico Faggin
usage: Not used for the first dream dictionary. Reserve for later consciousness and philosophy documentation.
